_comment: Single source of truth for the app's GLOBAL branding text. Edit these fields here (not in the in-app Settings screen) to change what shows across the app. The in-app 'Business Name' setting is now used ONLY on printed bill templates.
subtitle: MSA Auto Workshop

about.tagline: Crafted for car workshops - fast billing, clear payments, beautiful prints.

items.title: React
items.desc: The entire interface is built as a React application, optimised for mobile and desktop.

items.title: Cloud Firestore
items.desc: All bills, products, users and settings are stored in Firebase Firestore, with secure rules and low-read aggregate counters.
